title: Regex boundaries should not be used in a way that can never be matched
description: Avoid using regex boundaries in a way that can never be matched, as it can lead to incorrect pattern matching.
message: Regex boundaries should not be used in a way that can never be matched.
recommendation: Use a more specific regex or reconsider the pattern.

compliant.description: Negative lookarounds used correctly in anchored pattern.

why_is_this_an_issue: Negative lookarounds can lead to incorrect pattern matching if they are not used correctly.
how_to_fix: Use a more specific regex or reconsider the pattern.

metadata.title: Regex boundaries should not be used in a way that can never be matched
